full_text:
Wang Hun (Xuanchong) 王渾 (玄沖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Hun (王渾), styledXuanchong (玄沖), was born in Jinyang in Taiyuan. Warned that Sun Hao’s army was formidable and that they should wait a year. Wang Hun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
